title: Implement AI-powered automatic clip generation functionality

requirements.summary: Implement the useAutoGenerateClips hook to call backend generateClipsAutomatically method using React Query
acceptanceCriteria: Hook accepts videoId as a parameter
Hook uses React Query's useMutation to call the backend actor's generateClipsAutomatically method
Hook returns mutation object with mutate function, data, isLoading, and error states
Hook properly handles loading and error states
Generated clips are returned in a format compatible with the ClipSuggestions component

file_operations.description: Create a React Query hook that accepts a videoId parameter and uses useMutation to call the backend actor's generateClipsAutomatically method. Return mutation object with mutate function, data (array of AutoGeneratedClipSuggestion), isLoading, isError, and error states. Ensure the hook uses the useActor hook to access the backend actor and follows the same pattern as useClipCreation.ts for mutation setup.

requirements.summary: Add 'Generate AI Clips' button to VideoUrlForm component that triggers automatic clip generation
acceptanceCriteria: Button is displayed after a valid YouTube URL is submitted
Button triggers the useAutoGenerateClips hook with the current video ID
Button shows loading state while clips are being generated
Generated clips are passed to the parent component or stored in state for display in ClipSuggestions
Button is disabled during generation to prevent duplicate requests

file_operations.description: Add a 'Generate AI Clips' button that appears after a valid YouTube URL is submitted. Import and use the useAutoGenerateClips hook, passing the extracted video ID when the button is clicked. Show loading state on the button using the mutation's isLoading state. Disable the button during generation. Add an onClipsGenerated prop to the component that receives the generated clips array and calls it when mutation succeeds, passing the mutation data.

requirements.summary: Update App.tsx to integrate automatic clip generation into the video workflow and pass generated suggestions to ClipSuggestions
acceptanceCriteria: App component manages state for AI-generated clip suggestions
Generated clips are passed to ClipSuggestions component for display
User can trigger AI generation after loading a video
Generated suggestions persist until a new video is loaded
Component handles errors from the generation process gracefully

file_operations.description: Add state to manage AI-generated clip suggestions (array of AutoGeneratedClipSuggestion). Add an onClipsGenerated callback handler that receives generated clips from VideoUrlForm and stores them in state. Clear generated suggestions when a new video is loaded or when videoId changes. Pass the generated suggestions array to the ClipSuggestions component via its suggestions prop. Ensure error handling displays appropriate messages if clip generation fails.
